items.title: The Gospel of John: A Theological Introduction

items.why: Analyzes the significance of love and belief in John's Upper Room Discourse.
items.description: Analyzes the significance of love and belief in John's Upper Room Discourse.

items.title: Jesus and the Eyewitnesses: The Gospels as Eyewitness Testimony
items.author: Bauckham, Richard
items.why: Examines the resurrection as a pivotal event in the eyewitness accounts.
items.description: Examines the resurrection as a pivotal event in the eyewitness accounts.
items.citation: Bauckham, Richard. *Jesus and the Eyewitnesses: The Gospels as Eyewitness Testimony*.

items.title: Jesus According to Scripture: Restoring the Portrait from the Gospels
items.author: Bock, Darrell L
items.why: Analyzes the rejection of Jesus in light of Old Testament expectations.
items.description: Analyzes the rejection of Jesus in light of Old Testament expectations.

items.title: The Gospel of John: A Commentary
items.author: Bultmann, Rudolf
items.why: Analyzes the Johannine theology of Jesus as the fulfillment of the Old Testament.
items.description: Analyzes the Johannine theology of Jesus as the fulfillment of the Old Testament.
items.citation: Bultmann, Rudolf. *The Gospel of John: A Commentary*.

items.title: The Farewell Discourse and Final Prayer of Jesus

items.description: Examines the themes of love and belief in the Upper Room context.
items.citation: Carson, D. A. *The Farewell Discourse and Final Prayer of Jesus*.

items.title: Lord Jesus Christ: Devotion to Jesus in Earliest Christianity
items.author: Hurtado, Larry W
items.why: Discusses early Christian understanding of Jesus in light of Jewish monotheism.
items.description: Discusses early Christian understanding of Jesus in light of Jewish monotheism.

items.title: New Testament Theology

items.why: Discusses the theological implications of the Word becoming flesh in relation to Old Testament fulfillment.
items.description: Discusses the theological implications of the Word becoming flesh in relation to Old Testament fulfillment.

items.title: The Upper Room Discourse: A Study of John 13-17
items.author: Morris, Leon
items.why: Focuses specifically on the themes of love and belief in the discourse.
items.description: Focuses specifically on the themes of love and belief in the discourse.
items.citation: Morris, Leon. *The Upper Room Discourse: A Study of John 13-17*.

items.title: The Word Was Made Flesh and Dwelt among Us : Jesus Reasearch and Christian Faith
items.why: This source directly addresses the concept of Jesus as the Word made flesh, linking it to Old Testament themes, and discusses implications for understanding Jesus' role in relation to prophetic fulfillment and covenantal markers, making it highly relevant to all claims presented.
items.description: This source directly addresses the concept of Jesus as the Word made flesh, linking it to Old Testament themes, and discusses implications for understanding Jesus' role in relation to prophetic fulfillment and covenantal markers, making it highly relevant to all claims presented.
items.citation: The Word Was Made Flesh and Dwelt among Us : Jesus Reasearch and Christian Faith

items.title: Jesus and the Victory of God

items.description: Discusses the rejection of Jesus as part of the narrative of Israel's history.
items.citation: Wright, N. T. *Jesus and the Victory of God*.

items.title: The Resurrection of the Son of God

items.why: A comprehensive study on the significance of the resurrection in Christian theology.
